compiled_state.title: test-skill-path-refs: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT unset -> unbound variable at test line 19
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Expected Behavior
`bash tests/scripts/test-skill-path-refs.sh` exits 0 with all tests passing when run in a shell where `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT` is unset.

## Actual Behavior
Test aborts at line 19 with: `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT: unbound variable`. Tests 1-3 never run.

## Reproduction
- Unset `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT`; run `bash tests/scripts/test-skill-path-refs.sh`.
- Pre-existing — fails on HEAD.

## Root Cause Hypothesis
Test file sets `set -uo pipefail` at line 10 and references `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}` at line 19 without a default-substitution or self-resolution fallback.

## Fix Direction
Apply the SCRIPT_DIR-based self-resolution pattern that sibling tests and plugin scripts use — the test already computes `SCRIPT_DIR` at line 12 and `REPO_ROOT` at line 13, so adding `PLUGIN_DIR="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso}"` at line 19 resolves the gap without adding external dependencies.
